Docs
DOB
Tokenomics

DOB Token Tokenomics

The DOB token (0xF20cE503BCd9721ea43Ddd0485C66fa675BD3FC5) is fully minted, ensuring that no additional tokens can be generated. Following the community sale on July 6, 2025, a Liquidity Pool (LP) will be launched on Uniswap with 15% of the funds raised, establishing an initial market cap of $120 million.

Ownership and Benefits

Owning DOB tokens grants proportional rights to the protocol's generated fees. All fees are deposited into Dobprotocol's Profit Pool and redistributed among token holders based on their share.

$DOB Token Staking

An upcoming staking system will reward early adopters until the Uniswap Liquidity Pool is established.

Staking TierMax Tokens to RewardAPRMax Tokens to StakeDuration (Months)
Tier 125,000,00015.00%166,666,6676
Tier 215,000,00025.00%60,000,000120
Tier 310,000,00035.00%28,571,429210

Capital Allocation

In each funding round, 20% of the raised funds are allocated to liquidity in the LP. The breakdown of funds is as follows:

CategoryPercentage
Sales Activities15%
Research & Development5%
Marketing20%
Operational Costs40%
Provide Liquidity on Uniswap20%

Funding Rounds

The investment rounds are structured as follows:

RoundStart DateEnd DateDuration (Months)Capital (ETH)Stake (%)Market Cap (ETH)Token Price (ETH)Token Supply

Public Sale06/05/202506/06/202517,50010%75,0000.0000750100,000,000
Private Sale06/01/202506/06/2025126,0008%75,0000.000075080,000,000

Token Distribution

Token DistributionPercentageAmountNotes
Founders9%90,000,00024 month vesting plan with 4.17% monthly vesting until fully vested
Staking Rewards5%50,000,000Incentives for token holders
Buy / LP provider5%50,000,000Capital injections into the liquidity pool
Early Community18%180,000,000Direct minted webpage
Dobi Staking2%20,000,000Stake DOBI to earn DOB
Community6%60,000,000Grants
Airdrops1%10,000,000Airdrops, Rewards
Treasury35%350,000,000Operational Cost
VCs8%80,000,00018 month vesting plan with a 6 month cliff, after which 33% vests, followed by 5.56% monthly vesting.
Company10%100,000,000Dober LLC
Advisor/Director Board1%10,000,000Strategic Partners
Total100%1,000,000,000

Utility of the DOB Token

All major platform functionalities are powered by the DOB token:

  • Creation of Profit Pools.
  • Distributions are executed in DOB.
  • Collateral is provided in DOB.
  • AI agents are paid in DOB.

Get DOB Tokens

Don't miss the opportunity to participate in the DOB ecosystem! Visit our presale page to learn more about acquiring DOB tokens.
